example_it: La casa è grande e luminosa.
example_en: The house is big and bright.
The man is speaking with his wife.
The woman is reading a book.

example_it: La città è piena di storia.
example_en: The city is full of history.

notes: Uncountable; always singular in most contexts

example_it: Il tempo vola quando ci si diverte.
example_en: Time flies when you are having fun.

notes: Feminine despite ending in -o; irregular plural: mani
